# ZipFYI Embed Widget

> ZIP/postal codes, geocoding. Embeddable widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/zipfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>
<div data-zipfyi="entity" data-slug="example"></div>
```

## Available Widget Types (6)

- entity: `data-zipfyi="entity"`
- glossary: `data-zipfyi="glossary"`
- guide: `data-zipfyi="guide"`
- compare: `data-zipfyi="compare"`
- search: `data-zipfyi="search"`
- faq: `data-zipfyi="faq"`

## Customization

- **Themes**: light, dark, sepia, auto (follows system preference)
- **Sizes**: compact (280px), default (420px), large (720px)
- **Styles**: modern, classic

```html
<div data-zipfyi="entity" data-slug="example"
     data-theme="auto" data-size="compact" data-style-variant="modern"></div>
```

## Integration Methods

1. **Script tag** (recommended): `<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/zipfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>`
2. **iframe**: `https://zipfyi.com/iframe/entity/{slug}/`
3. **oEmbed**: `https://zipfyi.com/oembed?url={page_url}&format=json`
4. **Badge**: `https://zipfyi.com/badge/site.svg`

## Links

- Main site: https://zipfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.zipfyi.com
- API documentation: https://zipfyi.com/developers/
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/zipfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/zipfyi-embed

## Geo FYI Widget Network

- [DistanceFYI Widget](https://widget.distancefyi.com)
- [MountainFYI Widget](https://widget.mountainfyi.com)
- [QuakeFYI Widget](https://widget.quakefyi.com)

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
